sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101974" key="*swkratei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Σωκρᾰτ-εῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n101974.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">monument to Socrates</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Marin.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Procl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n101974.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> pl. <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Σωκρᾰ´τ-εια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">festival in memory of S.</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
